properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I give my mind Completely to You, Lord Fill me with Your thoughts, And make it all brand new Change my life Let me live in all that's true I just want to think like You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Take me and hold me Teach me to be still Lead me and guide me Show me Your perfect will

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Search me and cleanse me Purify my heart Change me, transform me In Your image let me stand

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Break me and mold me Till I be like You Reveal me Your pure Word Let Your light shine through me.
